ip_outcome_note: Card name is explicit: 'Son Gohan.' Official DBS-CG database designates the character as 'Son Gohan: Childhood' with Special Trait Saiyan/Earthling, Android/Cell Saga era — consistent with Union Force's Cell Saga thematic axis.

trivia_bullets.text: Union Force (DBS-B02) was released November 3, 2017. Its green subset is explicitly designed around the Android/Cell Saga, with Cell's Union-Absorb transformation as the headline mechanic. BT2-075 fits the green column; 'Supreme DNA' references Gohan's Saiyan-Earthling hybrid biology, which Cell appropriated as a key component of his own 'perfect' form.
sources: WebSearch: DBS official Union Force designer's note

trivia_bullets.text: 'Supreme DNA' reframes Gohan not as Cell's victim but as the genetic source — the template for supremacy that Cell copied. The 'Childhood' designation specifies pre-Cell-Games Gohan, consistent with the Android saga timeline where Gohan's potential was first becoming apparent.

Battle card, Green, Cost 3, Power 15000, Combo Power 5000, Common. Effect: if 2 or more Son Goku cards are in your Drop Area, reduce this card's energy cost by 2. A family-lineage synergy payoff rewarding Goku-focused Drop Area buildup — mechanically encouraging mixed Goku-Gohan green decks.

Special Trait: Saiyan/Earthling. Gohan is one of a small number of DBS-CG characters with a dual-trait listing — canonically the first half-Saiyan, half-human character of narrative significance, with a power ceiling theorized in-universe to exceed full-blooded Saiyans precisely because of the hybrid lineage.
